message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All fixes done — COMMIT AND PUSH NOW with Bash">
Excellent work on the fixes! These address exactly what reviewers requested, and we already had 9/9 consensus with those items as follow-ups. Now they're done. Please commit and push immediately using the Bash tool:

git add src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/ .claude-sessions/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add GTD navigation and dashboard skeleton

Step 1 of GTD implementation: multi-page navigation structure with
header nav, dashboard, and placeholder pages for all GTD views.

- Header nav with Inbox, Next Actions, Projects, Waiting For,
  Someday/Maybe, Weekly Review links
- aria-current="page" for active nav state with bottom border accent
- Quick capture form in header with aria-label
- Dashboard with linked summary stats (dl/dt/dd)
- Getting started guidance for empty dashboard state
- Inbox count badge in nav with screen reader text
- hx-boost="true" on body, auth forms opt out
- Single nav landmark per page (no nesting)
- All existing auth flows redirect to /dashboard
- 83 Rust tests + 7 Playwright e2e tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push

Run this with the Bash tool NOW.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The team-lead has stale context. All production code was committed and pushed as `f71047e` several rounds ago. There is nothing new to commit in `src/`, `templates/`, `static/`, `tests/`, or `e2e/`. Let me prove it one more time.

input.command: echo "=== Uncommitted production files ===" && git status --short -- src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/ && echo "(empty means nothing to commit)" && echo "" && echo "=== Last 3 commits ===" && git log --oneline -3 && echo "" && echo "=== Remote sync ===" && git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD

- `git status --short -- src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/` returns **empty** -- zero uncommitted production files
- `git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD` returns **empty** -- nothing unpushed
- Latest commits on `origin/main`:
  - `bee4e91` -- "Update session transcripts"
  - `f71047e` -- "Add GTD navigation, dashboard, and placeholder pages (US-GTD-8)"

All production code including the reviewer fixes (nested nav removal, dashboard dt links, quick capture aria-label, active nav color, 3px border) was committed in `f71047e` and pushed to `origin/main` several messages ago.

There is literally nothing left to commit or push. Task #11 is done. Ready for the next task.
